# AJ The Foot Doc: Dr. Alton R. Johnson Jr., DPM

> Official website of Dr. Alton R. Johnson Jr., DPM, DABPM, FACPM, FASPS, FFPM RCPS (Glasg), CWSP: board-certified podiatric surgeon, Certified Wound Specialist Physician, and Clinical Assistant Professor of Orthopaedic Surgery in the Division of Foot and Ankle Surgery at the University of Michigan Medical School. Known as "AJ The Foot Doc."

Key facts:
- Born in Baton Rouge, Louisiana and raised in Houston, Texas; committed to improving the health of underserved communities
- Specialties: limb salvage and prevention of lower extremity amputations, diabetic foot complications, chronic wounds, wound care, peripheral arterial disease, venous disease, Charcot neuroarthropathy, reconstructive foot and ankle surgery, and sports-related foot and ankle conditions
- President of the Save A Leg, Save A Life Foundation, a national effort to reduce preventable amputations through education, advocacy, and multidisciplinary collaboration
- First podiatrist to complete the University of Pennsylvania's Post-Doctoral Certificate in Clinical Research
- Only podiatric clinical investigator selected for the 2020 NIH/National Medical Association Academic Medicine Fellows Program
- 37 peer-reviewed journal articles, 105 scientific presentations, 25+ media interviews and features
- Awards include the APMA President's Award (2022), AAWC Emerging Leader Award (2022), and two SAWC 1st place awards (2022)
- Founder of AJ Educational Empowerment LLC, an education and mentorship company
- Featured in "10 Voices for 10 Years," Journal of Wound Care supplement with LINK for Wound Healing (2026)
- Education: BS Barry University; DPM Kent State University College of Podiatric Medicine; chief residency at HCA Florida Aventura Hospital; wound care fellowship at Penn Medicine; MHPE in progress at the University of Michigan

## Pages

- [Home](https://ajthefootdoc.com/): who Dr. Johnson is and what he does
- [About](https://ajthefootdoc.com/about/): full biography, training timeline, honors, credentials explained, affiliations and partners, FAQ
- [Consulting](https://ajthefootdoc.com/consulting/): clinical and product advisory, wound care and limb preservation strategy, research consulting, medical education and speaking; partners include LifeNet Health, Integra, HARTMANN, SutureGard, Advanced Solution, AlphaSights, Sygnola
- [Mentorship](https://ajthefootdoc.com/mentorship/): mentoring pre-med and podiatry students and early-career clinicians through AJ Educational Empowerment
- [Media & Speaking](https://ajthefootdoc.com/media/): interviews (Dean's Chat Ep. 133, Pod Patrol, The 700 Club), LINK feature, columns, speaking topics, booking
- [Insights](https://ajthefootdoc.com/blog/): articles and interview breakdowns
- [Resources](https://ajthefootdoc.com/resources/): free downloads including the Daily Diabetic Foot Self-Check (patient handout) and The Road to Podiatric Medicine (student roadmap), plus his CV
